title: German Krapfen Bread Rolls
description: Soft German bread rolls filled with sweet malty goodness. Perfect as a snack or dessert.
instructions: Combine cubed bread, melted butter, and warm water in a large mixing bowl.
Add malty ingredients and mix until well combined.
Knead dough for 5-7 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Shape each piece into a ball and then flatten slightly into a disk.
Place dough disks on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
Let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
